home.title: BT3017 Visual Learning Studio
home.subtitle: An interactive platform for visualising and learning selected BT3017 topics.
home.description: This application helps undergraduate students learn BT3017 through guided explanations, interactive visualisations, and short quizzes.

topics.name: PCA
topics.summary: Understand dimensionality reduction through principal components, projection, and explained variance.
topics.importance: Helps students understand how high-dimensional data can be represented more compactly.

topics.name: Audio Features
topics.summary: Learn waveform, FFT, and spectrogram intuition through interactive signal visualisation.
topics.importance: Shows how raw sound can be transformed into useful machine learning features.

topics.name: Graph Learning
topics.summary: Explore adjacency matrices, node degree, graph Laplacians, and spectral intuition.
topics.importance: Helps students understand how connected data can be represented and analysed.
